human_review_question_en: In sepsis treatment, the beta-lactam recommendation conflicts with the contraindication. Please verify the priority for patients with allergy history.
human_review_question_ja: 敗血症治療において、βラクタム系抗菌薬の推奨と禁忌が矛盾しています。アレルギー既往患者への優先順位を確認してください。

repair_candidates.rationale: Exclude allergy patients from recommendation scope

solver_evidence.description: Shared context satisfiable: patient with sepsis AND beta-lactam anaphylaxis history exists

human_review_question_en: In the vital-sign assessment table, temperatures >= 38.5 match both row 0 (antipyretic) and row 1 (cooling). Unique hit policy requires exactly one matching row.
human_review_question_ja: バイタルサイン評価表で、体温38.5℃以上のとき行0（解熱薬投与）と行1（冷却処置）の両方に該当します。Unique方針では1行のみ一致する必要があります。

solver_evidence.description: Overlap witness: temperature=38.7 satisfies both row_temp_high (>=38.0) and row_temp_very_high (>=38.5)

human_review_question_en: Event Calculus shows allergy_known persists from detection (t=0) to drug administration (t=10), detecting administration under active contraindication.
human_review_question_ja: イベント計算により、アレルギー歴（t=0）から薬剤投与（t=10）まで allergy_known が持続し、禁忌状態での投与が検出されました。

event_calculus.violation: Drug administered at t=10 while allergy_known holds (contraindication active)

repair_candidates.rationale: Administration must check allergy status before proceeding

solver_evidence.description: EC stable model confirms allergy_known persists from t=0 to t=10 with no terminating event
